# komodo_alerter (Data Source)

Reads an existing Komodo alerter resource.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "komodo_alerter" "example" {
  id = "6627c3e4f1a2b3c4d5e6f7a8"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `id` (String) The alerter identifier (ObjectId). One of `name` or `id` must be set.
- `name` (String) The unique name of the alerter. One of `name` or `id` must be set.

### Read-Only

- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether the alerter is enabled.
- `endpoint` (Attributes) The alerter endpoint configuration. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--endpoint))
- `maintenance` (Block List) Scheduled maintenance windows during which alerts from this alerter will be suppressed. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--maintenance))
- `resource` (Block List) Resources filtered by this alerter. `enabled = true` means included, `enabled = false` means excluded. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--resource))
- `types` (List of String) Alert types the alerter is configured to send. Empty means all types.

<a id="nestedatt--endpoint"></a>
### Nested Schema for `endpoint`

Read-Only:

- `email` (String) Optional email address. Only populated when `type` is `Ntfy`.
- `type` (String) The endpoint type: `Custom`, `Slack`, `Discord`, `Ntfy`, or `Pushover`.
- `url` (String) The webhook or endpoint URL.


<a id="nestedblock--maintenance"></a>
### Nested Schema for `maintenance`

Read-Only:

- `date` (String) For `OneTime` windows: ISO 8601 date in `YYYY-MM-DD` format.
- `day_of_week` (String) For `Weekly` schedules: day of the week (e.g. `Monday`, `Tuesday`).
- `description` (String) Description of what maintenance is performed.
- `duration_minutes` (Number) Duration of the maintenance window in minutes.
- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether this maintenance window is active.
- `hour` (Number) Start hour in 24-hour format (0–23).
- `minute` (Number) Start minute (0–59).
- `name` (String) Name for the maintenance window.
- `schedule_type` (String) Schedule type: `Daily`, `Weekly`, or `OneTime`.
- `timezone` (String) Timezone for the maintenance window. If empty, uses the Core timezone.


<a id="nestedblock--resource"></a>
### Nested Schema for `resource`

Read-Only:

- `enabled` (Boolean) If `true`, alerts are sent only for this resource (include). If `false`, alerts are never sent for this resource (exclude).
- `id` (String) The name or ID of the resource.
- `type` (String) The resource type.
